summary: Public Ticket & Customer Reviews (Iteration 96) - Backend 17/17 tests passed. All public ticket endpoints working correctly: GET /api/public/ticket/{id} returns validated tickets only (404 for pending/non-existent), POST /api/public/ticket/{id}/review allows 1 review per ticket (409 on duplicate, 422 on invalid rating, 400 on pending ticket), GET /api/public/reviews with filters (only_unread, min_rating), POST /api/public/reviews/{id}/read marks as read. Non-regression Lot 1 verified: bon_number generation and validated_only filter working.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ITER96_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Ticket & Customer Reviews feature fully tested and working. Key verified features: 1) GET /api/public/ticket/{id} returns validated tickets with items, total, bon_number, review_submitted flag - returns 404 for pending or non-existent tickets, 2) POST /api/public/ticket/{id}/review allows 1 review per ticket with rating 1-5, returns 409 on duplicate, 422 on invalid rating (0 or 6), 400 on pending ticket, 404 on non-existent, 3) GET /api/public/reviews returns list with total, unread, average_rating - supports only_unread and min_rating filters, 4) POST /api/public/reviews/{id}/read marks review as read. Non-regression: bon_number generation (BON-YYYYMMDD-NNNN) and validated_only filter both working correctly.

feature_verification.GET_reviews_list: PASSED - Returns items, total, unread, average_rating
